prompt:
Tileable seamless texture for use as global page background of an Eastern xianxia portfolio website "灵木洞天 / LYDT". Square format, designed to repeat without visible seams.

Subject: Deep ink-green paper noise. Very dark, near-black-green base #071714, with subtle organic noise — like wet handmade rice paper dyed with ink and lichen, with very faint flecks of slightly lighter moss green #1f3a2e and tiny golden particles barely visible. The pattern should be flat, low-contrast, suitable for tiling under text and UI components. No central focal point. No obvious motifs. No characters. No text.

The texture must be uniform enough to layer at 4-8% opacity over a solid color background without distracting from foreground content. Photographic realism, organic grain, no digital noise pattern, no obvious repetition.

Avoid: anything brightly colored, anything with a focal subject, gradients, vignettes, signatures, watermarks, logos, characters, glowing elements.
